raw_text: All commits on main must be SSH-signed with the project signing key.
note: mcp_remember always persists with USER lock; classifier not consulted.

raw_text: Never push directly to main; all changes land via pull request.
Use uv for every Python environment operation in this repository.
Conventional-commits prefix is required on every commit message subject.
Bench-gated v2.0 features only ship when their fixture clears the documented uplift floor.
Locked beliefs persist across origin transitions and survive demotion-pressure accumulation.
Public corpus content under tests/corpus/ must be authored from product-domain sources only.
note: mcp_remember; the very rule this corpus follows.

raw_text: Replay-equality must report zero mismatched and zero derived_orphan rows before the v2.x flip.
Atomic commits are preferred over bundled diffs in this codebase.
Force pushes to main are forbidden under the branch ruleset.
